title: helichrysum athrixiifolium
intro: Helichrysum athrixiifolium, also known as yellow mountain everlast, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Africa. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. Some of the health benefits associated with Helichrysum athrixiifolium include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
